Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight * bs."in.sqft") AS units_count, sum(bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight * bs."in.sqft") AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/acb52cd8b4692af946db73036d7990f58f664a46ae4b5329622296297e325616/e1656852-6643-4d83-89db-d6483e900e3d/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
